prompt: A realistic handheld smartphone photo of a {argument name="subject age" default="young adult woman"} shopping in a modern grocery store produce section at night, framed vertically from upper thighs to head in a close, slightly wide-angle perspective. She stands in the aisle beside brightly lit refrigerated shelves filled with packaged vegetables and colorful produce, with a black shopping basket cart visible on the right and glossy dark store interiors fading into soft bokeh in the background. She is holding an open cardboard egg carton toward the camera with exactly 6 visible brown eggs inside, creating a casual candid shopping moment. She has dark brown shoulder-length hair, a light warm skin tone, and is wearing a fitted monochrome brown outfit: a ribbed long-sleeve zip-front crop top with the zipper partially open at the chest, and matching high-waisted brown pants. The pose is confident and natural, torso angled slightly toward the camera, one arm presenting the egg carton and the other near the cart handle. Use dramatic supermarket lighting with bright highlights from the refrigerated cases, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, realistic fabric folds, subtle lens distortion from a phone camera, and high-detail commercial lifestyle photography. Keep the mood candid, fashionable, and urban, with the outfit color customizable as {argument name="outfit color" default="brown"}, the item in hand customizable as {argument name="held item" default="open carton of eggs"}, the store type customizable as {argument name="store setting" default="upscale grocery store produce aisle"}, and the camera style customizable as {argument name="camera style" default="handheld smartphone photo"}.
translatedPrompt: 一张由智能手机拍摄的竖版抓拍照片，主角是一位 {argument name="woman age" default="年轻成年"} 女性，在夜晚的现代超市货架间购物，构图从大腿上部到头部，采用近景且略带广角视角。她站在摆满彩色包装蔬菜和杂货的冷藏货架旁，背景是光亮的黑色货架、明亮的店面灯光、反光表面以及柔和的虚化效果。她左手向镜头展示着一个打开的再生纸浆鸡蛋盒，盒内清晰可见 6 枚棕色鸡蛋。她的右手靠近装满杂货的黑色购物篮车。她留着深棕色长发，面部被一个位于中心位置的大型柔边矩形模糊块刻意遮挡。她身穿一件紧身罗纹棕色拉链长袖短款上衣，胸前拉链微敞，搭配同色系高腰棕色长裤。姿态休闲自信，鸡蛋盒作为焦点道具呈现。写实摄影，无闪光灯室内照明，浅景深，细腻的皮肤和织物纹理，自然反光，高对比度，时尚生活方式美学，微妙的编辑风格，竖版 9:16 构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 超市货架鸡蛋盒人像：此提示词可生成一张逼真的竖版生活方式照片，展示了一位时尚女性在超市手持一盒六枚装鸡蛋的场景，适用于社交媒体或编辑风格的购物类图片。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
